course.title: Medicare vs. Medicaid: Telling Them Apart
course.description: A focused contrast module that teaches the difference between Medicare and Medicaid and their sub-parts (Parts A/B/C/D, CHIP, dual eligibility) by direct, side-by-side comparison.

modules.title: Medicare vs. Medicaid: Telling Them Apart
modules.summary: Medicare vs. Medicaid told apart across six axes: who qualifies, who funds it, what's covered, the sub-parts, cost, and dual eligibility.
